title: Several Food Craft
description: This mod brings several new foods to Minecraft for those of you who are tired of Minecraft's vanilla foods.
body:
![Food craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8c5eeb59c8dc3cca3fa83a1abb9bbe805bae29d.png)

This mod brings several new foods to Minecraft for those of you who are tired of Minecraft's vanilla foods.
More than 60 new items are added, such as:

- Sushi
- Hamburger
- Pizza
- Popsicle
- Banana
- Pineapple
- Lemon
- Onion
- Tomato
- Orange
- Litter
- Strawberry
- Pies
- Donuts
- Rice
- Hot dog
- French fries
And more...
 
**Recommended to use the "JEI" mod**

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
